pi_items.source: Task description and COVID-19 standard screening form practice. Form title is a standard identifier for COVID-19 screening forms in healthcare systems.

CDC COVID-19 screening protocol and epidemiological standards. Fever is confirmed as a primary screening symptom for COVID-19 in CDC COVID-19 Screening document and medical literature (72.7% prevalence in positive cases per screening clinic data).

pi_items.verified_value: Yes/No or Checkbox/Radio field (per task description)
pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Type: Yes/No (or Checkbox/Radio)'. This is standard for binary symptom screening questions in healthcare forms.

CDC COVID-19 screening protocol. Cough is the second most common COVID-19 screening symptom (59.5% prevalence in positive cases per screening clinic epidemiological data). Standard in COVID-19 screening forms.

pi_items.verified_value: Yes/No or Checkbox/Radio field (per task description)
pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Type: Yes/No (or Checkbox/Radio)'. Standard for binary symptom assessment in healthcare screening.
CDC and epidemiological standards for COVID-19 screening. Travel history is a confirmed epidemiological exposure criterion for COVID-19 screening (within past 10 days per standard protocols).

pi_items.verified_value: Text or Text Area field (per task description)
pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Type: Text (or Text Area)'. Appropriate for capturing detailed travel history information in healthcare forms.

pi_items.metadata_value: NOSH supports custom form creation with form builder
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed: NOSH ChartingSystem includes form-building feature accessible to admin users
pi_items.source: GitHub repository (shihjay2/nosh2), official NOSH blog (noshemr.wordpress.com), and MedEvel documentation confirm NOSH has electronic patient forms with customizable form builder interface.

pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed in setup_nosh.sh: admin user with password Admin1234! initialized via bcrypt hash
pi_items.source: setup_nosh.sh lines 147-150 and 166 explicitly show admin user creation with password hashing for Admin1234!

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a COVID-19 Screening form in NOSH ChartingSystem with three verified standard epidemiological fields: Fever (Yes/No), Cough (Yes/No), and Travel History (Text). All field selections are epidemiologically correct based on CDC COVID-19 screening protocols, where fever and cough are the primary symptoms (72.7% and 59.5% prevalence respectively in screening cohorts) and travel history is a standard exposure assessment criterion. NOSH ChartingSystem is confirmed as a real open-source EHR with form builder capabilities accessible to administrators. The environment initializes with proper admin credentials (admin/Admin1234!) and uses the official shihjay2/nosh2 Docker image.
